use_cases: Display social media links on a landing page or footer section
Enable community connection and social following for creators
Promote brand presence across multiple social platforms
Create an engaging contact or follow section with animated icons
Add social proof through visible social media connections
ai_summary: A visually striking social connection card featuring glass-morphism styling with purple glow effects on a dark gradient background. The component displays social media icons (Instagram, Twitter/X, LinkedIn, YouTube) within a 3D-styled container that responds to hover interactions with scale and shadow animations. Designed for landing pages and footer sections to encourage social engagement and community building.
